steps.title: Identify the concept requiring elaboration
steps.content: The first sentence states the field is “divided” between two camps. The blank introduces a sentence that must elaborate on that division—specifying what it actually consists of.

steps.title: Match the transition to the signal
steps.content: “That is” signals a clarification of a preceding idea: the second sentence explains the division by naming the two opposed positions. The other choices fail because they signal addition, opposition, or equivalence rather than elaboration. That matches choice D — D is correct.
